task_name: Add Builder Read Probe Schema Block Fixtures
goal: Add local schema-block fixtures for malformed Builder read-probe inputs without changing runtime behavior or enabling live Builder access.
claims: BP-025 adds malformed-read schema fixtures for local probe review.
The existing runtime already blocks these cases; BP-025 only records and tests them.
No live Builder call, auth, secret, DB, persistence, or write behavior is introduced.
assumptions: The BP-022/BP-024 runtime behavior is correct for malformed reads.
Adding golden fixtures is sufficient hardening for this block.
The adapter review suite remains the shared verification entrypoint.
dod: Fixtures exist for read-not-object, missing-method, and relative-path inputs.
tools/test-builder-live-read-probe.cjs covers the new fixtures via function and CLI output.
stop_conditions: Live Builder call, base URL, auth, secret, DB, persistence, write, execute, approval, or deploy behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-024 added local blocked-mode and empty-read coverage plus CLI golden checks.
